approved.name: Biostars
approved.notes: Broad bioinformatics Q&A. REST API available. Use curl with browser-like User-Agent to avoid 403.

approved.name: SEQanswers
approved.notes: Sequencing-focused forum. Scraping required with full browser User-Agent.

approved.name: Reddit r/bioinformatics
approved.notes: General bioinformatics community. Reddit JSON API requires a descriptive User-Agent per Reddit API rules. No OAuth needed for read-only access.

approved.name: Bioconductor Support
approved.notes: R/Bioconductor Q&A. Discourse-based — use JSON API endpoints directly with curl rather than WebFetch.

approved.name: Galaxy Help Forum
approved.notes: Public Discourse forum for Galaxy Project users. Researchers ask about data sources, public datasets, and analysis workflows. Confirmed accessible during 2026-06-12 run when all other forums were blocked.
approved.rationale: Only forum accessible during first run (2026-06-12). Active ~50+ new topics/week. GitHub issue: https://github.com/NIAID-Data-Ecosystem/NDE-community-crawler/issues/1

approved.name: Bioinformatics Stack Exchange
approved.notes: Dedicated bioinformatics Q&A site. Stack Exchange API v2.3 requires no authentication for read access. High-quality questions with tagging (dataset, databases, ngs). Filter by tags: dataset, databases.

approved.name: Stack Overflow (bioinformatics tag)
approved.notes: Large developer community. Bioinformatics+dataset tag intersection surfaces researchers seeking data access tools and APIs. Stack Exchange API v2.3, no auth required.
